title: jacobaea auricula
intro: Jacobaea auricula, also known as golden ragwort, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jacobaea auricula include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Jacobaea auricula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically as a salve or ointment to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
